title: My AI Memory Now Follows Me Across Every Tool!
summary: Walrus Memory is a persistent memory layer that operates outside individual AI agents, allowing context and memories to transfer across different AI tools and providers. The system encrypts memories owned by the user and allows selective access control across agents like Claude, Codex, and Pi with simple setup.
